title: Bedder Mod
description: Improve the UI when a player is spam clicking on a bed.
body:
You can only sleep at night or during thunderstorms **better than ever before**!

This mod is the result of _dozens_ of minutes of development and endorsed by longtime HermitCraft member Joe Hills, who specifically complained that the text that appears on screen when you click a bed before sunset should grow larger and angrier over time.

This mod unlocks that text expansion and hue shift in a manner that will delight and unsettle Minecraft players who absentmindedly click on beds while the sun is still up.
